hero_title: Software Engineer | Backend, APIs and Cloud
hero_subtitle: Designing scalable systems, robust APIs and cloud-native applications.
about_intro: Full Stack Software Engineer with over 15 years of experience in software development, systems architecture and technical leadership.
about_experience: Since 2008 I have been building scalable solutions, REST APIs, microservices and high-performance web applications. Strong backend experience with Python and Node.js, along with cloud computing, Docker and relational and non-relational databases.
about_focus: Focus on software architecture, best practices (Clean Code, SOLID, Design Patterns), automated testing, CI/CD pipelines, RESTful APIs, microservices, cloud (GCP) and Docker containers.
about_opportunities: Open to opportunities as: Software Engineer | Backend Engineer | Tech Lead | Full Stack Developer
project_swapi: REST API integrated with Google Cloud using scalable architecture.
project_toolbox: Collection of reusable utilities to accelerate backend projects.
project_normalize: Python library for data normalization and standardization.
project_mexico: Structured dataset of Mexican cities for applications and APIs.
project_docker: Experimentation and testing environment using Docker containers.
